name: civil_infrastructure_clinical_trial_millhaven_ind_col
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Civil Infrastructure, the situation tagged internally around civil infrastructure clinical trial millhaven ind col has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Luc Sato
agents.identity: I am Luc Sato, the accountable executive on this bridge in Civil Infrastructure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Sana Berg
agents.identity: I am Sana Berg, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Civil Infrastructure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of collective.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of individual even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Luc Sato must choose under individual versus collective. What does Luc Sato do?
